assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 54: '-1 assertion specificity relaxed in `test_recommend_purls_basic`: the assertion on `body.items[0].purl` changed from checking a fully qualified PURL with qualifiers (`"pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12?repository_url=https://repo1.maven.org&type=jar"`) to checking a versioned PURL without qualifiers (`"pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12"`). The matched string is shorter and less specific -- the assertion no longer verifies that repository_url and type qualifiers are correctly serialized.' Additionally, semantic assessment at line 71: 'Assertion relaxation in basic test: The assertion change from a fully qualified PURL string to a versioned-only PURL string is a semantic weakening.'
